sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102198" key="take/rwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰκέρ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n102198.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boiling to softness</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἕψε μέχρι -ώσεως</foreign> Arching.(?)ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
